mentions.note: Cosmetics group broadly challenged; can't buck sectoral weakness. Good company but sector too troubled to touch.
Caller Arthur notes 25-50% annual growth yet stock beaten up; Cramer concerned about China manufacturing exposure, inexplicable decline, and large short position—confused about stock action.
Erratic performance recently but Cramer has faith it can go higher; hold off on selling despite recent weakness.

Stock troubled by manufacturing confusion despite strong fundamentals; hold for potential tariff upside (could gain $25 if Supreme Court overturns tariffs); don't sell on weakness reflecting unwarranted concerns.
